name: V2 - Module 7B v1.3 - Agent Market Brief PDF (B&W, 6-page consolidated)

parameters.jsCode: function clean(v){return String(v??'').trim();}function norm(v){return clean(v).toUpperCase();}function toNum(v){const n=Number(String(v??'').replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));return Number.isFinite(n)&&n>0?n:null;}const BATCH_SIZE=1;const output=[];for(const item of $input.all()){const row=item.json;if(!clean(row['Source Key']))continue;if(norm(row['Automation Eligible'])!=='YES')continue;if(!norm(row['Clarity Route']).includes('ACTIVE LISTING'))continue;if(norm(row['Sale / Rent'])!=='SALE')continue;if(norm(row['Property Segment'])!=='CONDO')continue;const pdfStatus=norm(row['AI Market Brief PDF Status']);if(pdfStatus&&pdfStatus!=='PENDING')continue;if(clean(row['AI Market Brief PDF Link']))continue;const docLink=clean(row['AI Market Brief Google Doc Link'])||clean(row['AI Market Brief Doc Link']);if(!docLink)continue;if(!clean(row['Asset Folder Link']))continue;if(!toNum(row['CMA Min Transacted PSF'])||!toNum(row['CMA Max Transacted PSF']))continue;output.push(item);if(output.length>=BATCH_SIZE)break;}return output;

parameters.name: ={{ $node['Build PDF HTML Content'].json['Project Name'] }} {{ '#' + String($node['Build PDF HTML Content'].json['Level'] || '').padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String($node['Build PDF HTML Content'].json['Unit'] || '').padStart(2,'0') }} - Agent Market Brief.pdf

parameters.jsCode: const sourceRow=$node['Build PDF HTML Content'].json;const uploaded=$node['Upload PDF to Asset Folder'].json;const fileId=uploaded.id||'';const webViewLink=uploaded.webViewLink||(fileId?'https://drive.google.com/file/d/'+fileId+'/view':'');const now=new Date();const sgTime=new Date(now.toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Singapore'}));const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');const timestamp=sgTime.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(sgTime.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(sgTime.getDate())+' '+pad(sgTime.getHours())+':'+pad(sgTime.getMinutes());const planStatus=sourceRow['_planStatus']?(' Plans: '+sourceRow['_planStatus']+'.'):'';return [{json:{'row_number':sourceRow['row_number'],'AI Market Brief PDF Status':'Generated','AI Market Brief PDF Link':webViewLink,'AI Market Brief PDF File ID':fileId,'AI Market Brief PDF Last Updated':timestamp,'AI Market Brief PDF Notes':'PDF generated by Module 7B v1.3. Includes range graph + floorplan/site plan.'+planStatus+' Source: URA + PropertyGuru snapshot.'}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: ($node['Inject Neighbour Asking'].json['PDF HTML Content'] || $node['Inject Master Plan'].json['PDF HTML Content'] || $node['Inject Advisor'].json['PDF HTML Content']), landscape: false, format: 'A4', sandbox: false }) }}

parameters.queryString: ={{ "'" + ((String($node['Select 1 Pending PDF Row'].json['Asset Folder Link'] || '').match(/folders\/([^/?]+)/) || [])[1] || "") + "' in parents and trashed = false" }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ids = ($node['Assemble Plans'].json._stalePdfIds) || [];
return ids.filter(Boolean).map(id => ({ json: { staleFileId: id } }));
